sub_modules.pe: Pure combinational processing-element next-state block. It forwards north input south, west input east, and computes the signed 32x32 multiply-accumulate next result from the current accumulator.
sub_modules.systolic_done_control: Pure combinational control block that advances the 4-bit cycle counter and asserts done after the systolic computation latency.
sub_modules.result_mapper_4x4: Pure combinational output mapper that maps the 16 internal PE accumulator registers to the flattened result0 through result15 top-level result ports.
